body_excerpt:
ASUS has released important security updates for ASUS System Control Interface Service in MyASUS.
  • The issue has been resolved in the following releases published 
  • ASUS System Control Interface 3.1.61.0 (x64)
ASUS System Control Interface 3.2.62.0 (ARM)
This update applies to all personal computer, including desktop, laptop, NUC, and All-in-One PC.
 
How to check the ASUS System Control Interface version
Open MyASUS → Settings → About
 
Users can obtain the update through:
1.    Windows Update
2.    Downloading the updated package directly from the ASUS Support site.
https://www.asus.com/support/
 
CVE-2026-3508
CVSS 4.0 Score：6.8 / Medium
AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Security Update for MyASUS
